verdict.answer_first: A states the two most important problems in its first sentence: "the two that matter most are the missing error handling and the lack of any authorization."
verdict.decisiveness: B provides a single, complete, recommended implementation under the heading "A tightened version:", which is more decisive than A's survey of options.
verdict.fabrication: B invents more placeholder functions: "`isValidId(req.params.id)`, `canView(req.user, req.params.id)`".
verdict.actionability: B is more actionable because it provides a single, complete code block that integrates all the fixes and presents the issues as a prioritized list.
